candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When live indicator conviction reads 100% but green_matches=0 (no historical analog confirmed in memory), treat the signal as UNVERIFIED and cap size — full conviction without a single matched historical pattern is overfit noise, not edge.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: The 30-indicator consensus reaching 100% (EURUSD 14/30 bear, AUDUSD 16/30 bear) while green_matches=0 means the current configuration has never resolved favorably in the stored library. Institutional flow that produces durable moves leaves repeated fingerprints; a 'perfect' live read with zero historical confirmation is the signature of a one-off crowding event (here, a fading AI-euphoria tape per the briefing) that mean-reverts rather than trends. The hist_hr of 66-70% is a category average, not a confirmation of THIS instance.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0: size_multiplier *= 0.6  # require at least 1 matched historical analog before full size
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Reduces variance of high-conviction-but-unconfirmed entries; expected Sharpe +0.02-0.03 by trimming the worst tail of overfit-signal trades while preserving matched-analog winners.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: Current consensus shows EURUSD conv=100% green_matches=0 and AUDUSD conv=100% green_matches=0; meanwhile USDJPY conv=83% green_matches=0 has hist_hr=0%, showing that conviction and historical confirmation are decoupled fields. The briefing flags the directional impulse as FADING, consistent with high-conviction reads lacking durable backing.

retirement_flag.reason: L8 tightened the USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate to 13 in a bull-market frame; current macro shows GDP only 2.1%, UMich sentiment collapsing 49.8→44.8, and VIX ~18.9 — the 'bull market + VIX>13' premise may no longer hold, so the gate could be vetoing valid safe-haven trades in a deteriorating-growth regime.

reflection.system_health_note: Zero trades in 7 days with Regime=UNKNOWN and TradingView showing 0 signals — the system is correctly in a low-conviction freeze, but the 100%-conviction/0-match consensus reads are exactly the trap to gate before any thaw.
